---
title: "spine_map_bias"
format: revealjs
---

![](../shared_media/images/spine_content_map.png){fig-align="center" height=600}

::: notes
We've seen this map of the process of fitting models before
:::

## 

![](../shared_media/images/spine_lec_04.png){fig-align="center" height=600}

::: notes

:::
